TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-frog_minzhu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira kuya ccay a wawa dadayatu i u tihi nira u widang nira u ccay wacu atu ccay takula'.
S.PHON: ira kuja ʦʦaj a wawa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajatu i u tiħi nira u wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira u ʦʦaj waʦu atu ʦʦaj takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: ira kuya ccay a wawa dadayatu i u tihi nira u widang nira u ccay wacu atu ccay takula'.
S.PHON: ira kuja ʦʦaj a wawa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajatu i u tiħi nira u wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira u ʦʦaj waʦu atu ʦʦaj takuɾaʡ.

TRANSL.notes: 有一個小孩,到了晚上,(他跟)他的同伴也是朋友、一隻狗和一隻青蛙(在一起).

S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩,到了晚上, 他的同伴也是朋友、一隻狗和一隻青蛙 .

TRANSL.notes: There was a child, at night (he stayed with) his partner and friend, a dog and a frog.

S.TRANSL: There was a child, at night his partner and friend, a dog and a frog.

S.FORM: telihan kiya takula' itini i talid nira nawhani kalimelaan nira a widang kuna takula'.
S.PHON: təɾiħan kija takuɾaʡ itini i taɾiɬ~ɮ nira nawħani kaɾiməɾaan nira a wiɬ~ɮaŋ kuna takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: telihan kiya takula' itini i talid nira nawhani kalimelaan nira a widang kuna takula'.
S.PHON: təɾiħan kija takuɾaʡ itini i taɾiɬ~ɮ nira nawħani kaɾiməɾaan nira a wiɬ~ɮaŋ kuna takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他把青蛙放在他的瓶子裡,因為那隻青蛙是他最疼惜的朋友.
He put the frog in his bottle, because the frog was his most cherished friend.

S.FORM: halafintu i sakafuti'antu cingra i mafuti'tu cingra widang nira a wacu i patihi' cingranan mafuti'.
S.PHON: ħaɾafintu i sakafutiʡantu ʦiŋra i mafutiʡtu ʦiŋra wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira a waʦu i patiħiʡ ʦiŋranan mafutiʡ.
S.FORM: halafintu i sakafuti'antu cingra i mafuti'tu cingra widang nira a wacu i patihi' cingranan mafuti'.
S.PHON: ħaɾafintu i sakafutiʡantu ʦiŋra i mafutiʡtu ʦiŋra wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira a waʦu i patiħiʡ ʦiŋranan mafutiʡ.
S.TRANSL: 過了不久,他想睡覺,他就睡覺了,他的朋友和狗陪伴他睡覺.
Afterwards, he wanted to sleep and slept. His friend and the dog slept with him.

S.FORM: nika lafi'i i masadak kiya takula' a mitekur a masadak.
S.PHON: nika ɾafiʡi i masaɬ~ɮak kija takuɾaʡ a mitəkur a masaɬ~ɮak.
S.FORM: nika lafi'i i masadak kiya takula' a mitekur a masadak.
S.PHON: nika ɾafiʡi i masaɬ~ɮak kija takuɾaʡ a mitəkur a masaɬ~ɮak.
S.TRANSL: 直到三更半夜,青蛙跳出去.
At midnight, the frog jumped out.

S.FORM: u lafaktu ma u lafaktu i nengnenghan nira awatu kuya takula' sanengnengnengneng sa cangra tatusa mikilim awa.
S.PHON: u ɾafaktu ma u ɾafaktu i nəŋnəŋħan nira awatu kuja takuɾaʡ sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ sa ʦaŋra tatusa mikiɾim awa.
S.FORM: u lafaktu ma u lafaktu i nengnenghan nira awatu kuya takula' sanengnengnengneng sa cangra tatusa mikilim awa.
S.PHON: u ɾafaktu ma u ɾafaktu i nəŋnəŋħan nira awatu kuja takuɾaʡ sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ sa ʦaŋra tatusa mikiɾim awa.
S.TRANSL: 早上他看到青蛙不見了,他們兩個左看右看,尋找,沒有.
In the morning, he saw that the frog was gone, and they looked around, looking for the frog, but didn't find it.

S.FORM: ya wacu sa i safuhafuhat sa mipadang mikilim ca'ay pakatama.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa i safuħafuħat sa mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mikiɾim ʦaʡaj pakatama.
S.FORM: ya wacu sa i safuhafuhat sa mipadang mikilim ca'ay pakatama.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa i safuħafuħat sa mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mikiɾim ʦaʡaj pakatama.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗翻來翻去找,沒有找到.
The dog made a thorough search, but didn't find the frog.

S.FORM: wadwadeng nira ku luma ningra i ca'ay pakatama niya wawa.
S.PHON: waɬ~ɮwaɬ~ɮəŋ nira ku ɾuma niŋra i ʦaʡaj pakatama nija wawa.
S.FORM: wadwadeng nira ku luma ningra i ca'ay pakatama niya wawa.
S.PHON: waɬ~ɮwaɬ~ɮəŋ nira ku ɾuma niŋra i ʦaʡaj pakatama nija wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在家裡找來找去,也沒找到.
The child searched his house for the frog, but didn't find it.

S.FORM: saka ya wacu i ca'ay pina'on pacumudhan nira ku funguh nira mikilim tiya talid i macumud i talid kiya funguh ningra i saceliceli' sa kuya wacu atu kaemangay wawa i.
S.PHON: saka ja waʦu i ʦaʡaj pinaʡo~un paʦumuɬ~ɮħan nira ku fuŋuħ nira mikiɾim tija taɾiɬ~ɮ i maʦumuɬ~ɮ i taɾiɬ~ɮ kija fuŋuħ niŋra i saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡ sa kuja waʦu atu kaəmaŋaj wawa i.
S.FORM: saka ya wacu i ca'ay pina'on pacumudhan nira ku funguh nira mikilim tiya talid i macumud i talid kiya funguh ningra i saceliceli' sa kuya wacu atu kaemangay wawa i.
S.PHON: saka ja waʦu i ʦaʡaj pinaʡo~un paʦumuɬ~ɮħan nira ku fuŋuħ nira mikiɾim tija taɾiɬ~ɮ i maʦumuɬ~ɮ i taɾiɬ~ɮ kija fuŋuħ niŋra i saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡ sa kuja waʦu atu kaəmaŋaj wawa i.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗不小心把頭放進去瓶子找,他的頭進到瓶子裡,狗和小孩不斷的呼救

TRANSL.notes: The dog accidentally put its head into the bottle to search the bottle (for the frog), and his head entered the bottle. The dog and the child kept calling.

S.TRANSL: The dog accidentally put its head into the bottle to search the bottle , and his head entered the bottle. The dog and the child kept calling.

S.FORM: minengneng mikilim tuya takula' ningra.
S.PHON: minəŋnəŋ mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ niŋra.
S.FORM: minengneng mikilim tuya takula' ningra.
S.PHON: minəŋnəŋ mikiɾim tuja takuɾaʡ niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他們去尋找那隻青蛙.
They looked for the frog.

S.FORM: ca'ay pina'on kiya wacu i matefad nika peleng satu kiya talid i.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinaʡo~un kija waʦu i matəfaɬ~ɮ nika pəɾəŋ satu kija taɾiɬ~ɮ i.
S.FORM: ca'ay pina'on kiya wacu i matefad nika peleng satu kiya talid i.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinaʡo~un kija waʦu i matəfaɬ~ɮ nika pəɾəŋ satu kija taɾiɬ~ɮ i.

TRANSL.notes: 那隻狗不小心,(瓶子)掉落下來,之後那個瓶子破掉了.

S.TRANSL: 那隻狗不小心, 掉落下來,之後那個瓶子破掉了.

TRANSL.notes: The dog was not careful and (the bottle) fell down. Afterwards, the bottle was broken.

S.TRANSL: The dog was not careful and fell down. Afterwards, the bottle was broken.

S.FORM: maalatu niya kaemangay wawa kiya wacu afufuhan nira kuya wacu ningra.
S.PHON: maaɾatu nija kaəmaŋaj wawa kija waʦu afufuħan nira kuja waʦu niŋra.
S.FORM: maalatu niya kaemangay wawa kiya wacu afufuhan nira kuya wacu ningra.
S.PHON: maaɾatu nija kaəmaŋaj wawa kija waʦu afufuħan nira kuja waʦu niŋra.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩把狗抓起來,抱在懷裡.
The child took the dog and held it in the arms.

S.FORM: saceliceli' sa kiya wawa tyak takula' nira i ca'ay katama.
S.PHON: saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡ sa kija wawa tjak takuɾaʡ nira i ʦaʡaj katama.
S.FORM: saceliceli' sa kiya wawa tyak takula' nira i ca'ay katama.
S.PHON: saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡ sa kija wawa tjak takuɾaʡ nira i ʦaʡaj katama.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩不斷地呼叫他的青蛙,沒有找到.
The child kept calling his frog, but didn't find it.

S.FORM: nika iraay i adihay ku tatekuh a maefer i kaayaw nangra.
S.PHON: nika iraaj i aɬ~ɮiħaj ku tatəkuħ a maəfər i kaajaw naŋra.
S.FORM: nika iraay i adihay ku tatekuh a maefer i kaayaw nangra.
S.PHON: nika iraaj i aɬ~ɮiħaj ku tatəkuħ a maəfər i kaajaw naŋra.
S.TRANSL: 但是在遙遠的地方,有蜜蜂在他們面前飛來飛去.
There were bees flying in front of them at a distance.

S.FORM: sacekucekur sa kiya wacu sapi tatuyan tiya tatekuh.
S.PHON: saʦəkuʦəkur sa kija waʦu sapi tatujan tija tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: sacekucekur sa kiya wacu sapi tatuyan tiya tatekuh.
S.PHON: saʦəkuʦəkur sa kija waʦu sapi tatujan tija tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗跳來跳去,想去抓那些蜜蜂
The dog kept jumping and wanted to catch the bees.

S.FORM: nika i ayaw nangra ira ku ccay luma nu tatekuh.
S.PHON: nika i ajaw naŋra ira ku ʦʦaj ɾuma nu tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: nika i ayaw nangra ira ku ccay luma nu tatekuh.
S.PHON: nika i ajaw naŋra ira ku ʦʦaj ɾuma nu tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 但是在他們前面,有一個蜂窩.
There was a beehive in front of them.

S.FORM: itira kiya wacu i maaraw niya wacu kiya tatekuh sapikalican mi mingiyangi tiya kilang.
S.PHON: itira kija waʦu i maaraw nija waʦu kija tatəkuħ sapikaɾiʦan mi miŋijaŋi tija kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: itira kiya wacu i maaraw niya wacu kiya tatekuh sapikalican mi mingiyangi tiya kilang.
S.PHON: itira kija waʦu i maaraw nija waʦu kija tatəkuħ sapikaɾiʦan mi miŋijaŋi tija kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 狗在那裡,狗看到蜜蜂,想爬上去,搖動那棵樹.
The dog was there. When the dog saw the bees, it wanted to climb up and shook the tree.

S.FORM: ya wawa saceliceli'han nira ku kiya ufang i laenu' i.
S.PHON: ja wawa saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡħan nira ku kija ufaŋ i ɾaənuʡ i.
S.FORM: ya wawa saceliceli'han nira ku kiya ufang i laenu' i.
S.PHON: ja wawa saʦəɾiʦəɾiʡħan nira ku kija ufaŋ i ɾaənuʡ i.
S.TRANSL: 小孩對著洞口底下呼叫.
The child kept shouting towards the hole.

S.FORM: sa i ufang nu suta' i nenghan i awa kiya takula' uya masadakay sa i ira kiya edu a masadak.
S.PHON: sa i ufaŋ nu sutaʡ i nəŋħan i awa kija takuɾaʡ uja masaɬ~ɮakaj sa i ira kija əɬ~ɮu a masaɬ~ɮak.
S.FORM: sa i ufang nu suta' i nenghan i awa kiya takula' uya masadakay sa i ira kiya edu a masadak.
S.PHON: sa i ufaŋ nu sutaʡ i nəŋħan i awa kija takuɾaʡ uja masaɬ~ɮakaj sa i ira kija əɬ~ɮu a masaɬ~ɮak.
S.TRANSL: 那個洞口,一直看,也沒有那隻青蛙,出來的是一隻老鼠.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) searched the hole, but the frog was not there; a mouse went out instead.

S.TRANSL: searched the hole, but the frog was not there; a mouse went out instead.

S.FORM: ikur i ma'araw nuna wawa ku ku kilang.
S.PHON: ikur i maʡaraw nuna wawa ku ku kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ikur i ma'araw nuna wawa ku ku kilang.
S.PHON: ikur i maʡaraw nuna wawa ku ku kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 之後,那個小孩看到一棵樹.
Then, the child saw a tree.

S.FORM: harateng sa cingra i latek ira i ya ufang niya kilang kiya takula' nu maku sa i.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra i ɾatək ira i ja ufaŋ nija kiɾaŋ kija takuɾaʡ nu maku sa i.
S.FORM: harateng sa cingra i latek ira i ya ufang niya kilang kiya takula' nu maku sa i.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra i ɾatək ira i ja ufaŋ nija kiɾaŋ kija takuɾaʡ nu maku sa i.
S.TRANSL: 他想,我那隻青蛙可能在這個樹洞口裡.
He thought that perhaps my frog was inside the tree hole.

S.FORM: mi sulsul tu kamay a tayra minengneng nenghan masadakay i u ekung.
S.PHON: mi suɾsuɾ tu kamaj a tajra minəŋnəŋ nəŋħan masaɬ~ɮakaj i u əkuŋ.
S.FORM: mi sulsul tu kamay a tayra minengneng nenghan masadakay i u ekung.
S.PHON: mi suɾsuɾ tu kamaj a tajra minəŋnəŋ nəŋħan masaɬ~ɮakaj i u əkuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他把手伸進樹洞裡探究,結果出來的是貓頭鷹.

TRANSL.notes: He stretched out his hand to see (if the frog was inside), but it turned out that what came out was an owl.

S.TRANSL: He stretched out his hand to see , but it turned out that what came out was an owl.

S.FORM: masadak kiya ekung.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮak kija əkuŋ.
S.FORM: masadak kiya ekung.
S.PHON: masaɬ~ɮak kija əkuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來.
The owl came out.

S.FORM: nika ya wacu sa pakayni pingiyangi nira tiya kilang i masadak ma 'min kuya tatekuh mila'up tuya wacu cikay satu kiya wacu.
S.PHON: nika ja waʦu sa pakajni piŋijaŋi nira tija kiɾaŋ i masaɬ~ɮak ma ʡmin kuja tatəkuħ miɾaʡup tuja waʦu ʦikaj satu kija waʦu.
S.FORM: nika ya wacu sa pakayni pingiyangi nira tiya kilang i masadak ma 'min kuya tatekuh mila'up tuya wacu cikay satu kiya wacu.
S.PHON: nika ja waʦu sa pakajni piŋijaŋi nira tija kiɾaŋ i masaɬ~ɮak ma ʡmin kuja tatəkuħ miɾaʡup tuja waʦu ʦikaj satu kija waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗搖動那棵樹之後,蜜蜂全部飛出來去追那隻狗,那隻狗就一直跑.
After the dog shook the tree, all the bees came out and chased the dog, so the dog kept running.

S.FORM: na wawa i pakayni tuya ira ku ekung masadak matalaw milimek.
S.PHON: na wawa i pakajni tuja ira ku əkuŋ masaɬ~ɮak mataɾaw miɾimək.
S.FORM: na wawa i pakayni tuya ira ku ekung masadak matalaw milimek.
S.PHON: na wawa i pakajni tuja ira ku əkuŋ masaɬ~ɮak mataɾaw miɾimək.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩從貓頭鷹出來之後就害怕地躲起來.
After the owl came out, the child was scared and hid himself.

S.FORM: cumikaytu masiday tu tatusa ya wacu atu kaemangay wawa.
S.PHON: ʦumikajtu masiɬ~ɮaj tu tatusa ja waʦu atu kaəmaŋaj wawa.
S.FORM: cumikaytu masiday tu tatusa ya wacu atu kaemangay wawa.
S.PHON: ʦumikajtu masiɬ~ɮaj tu tatusa ja waʦu atu kaəmaŋaj wawa.
S.TRANSL: 跑走,忽略狗跟小孩.

TRANSL.notes: (He) ran away, ignoring the dog and the child.

S.TRANSL: ran away, ignoring the dog and the child.

S.FORM: nika sapikiliman kiya wawa takula' sa nira i kalic sa tu ccay fukeluh.
S.PHON: nika sapikiɾiman kija wawa takuɾaʡ sa nira i kaɾiʦ sa tu ʦʦaj fukəɾuħ.
S.FORM: nika sapikiliman kiya wawa takula' sa nira i kalic sa tu ccay fukeluh.
S.PHON: nika sapikiɾiman kija wawa takuɾaʡ sa nira i kaɾiʦ sa tu ʦʦaj fukəɾuħ.
S.TRANSL: 但是,那個小孩想去找青蛙,爬上一個石頭.

TRANSL.notes: But the child wanted to look for the frog. (He) climbed up a rock.

S.TRANSL: But the child wanted to look for the frog. climbed up a rock.

S.FORM: tatuyhan nira tiya kilang u kilang kunian sa celi saceli XXXX nenghan u n u lunem.
S.PHON: tatujħan nira tija kiɾaŋ u kiɾaŋ kunian sa ʦəɾi saʦəɾi xxxx nəŋħan u n u ɾunəm.
S.FORM: tatuyhan nira tiya kilang u kilang kunian sa celi saceli XXXX nenghan u n u lunem.
S.PHON: tatujħan nira tija kiɾaŋ u kiɾaŋ kunian sa ʦəɾi saʦəɾi xxxx nəŋħan u n u ɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 他抓住那棵樹,但那棵樹結果原來是鹿.
He held on to the tree, but the tree turned out to be a deer.

S.FORM: u lunem kuya nalunem kuya masadakay.
S.PHON: u ɾunəm kuja naɾunəm kuja masaɬ~ɮakaj.
S.FORM: u lunem kuya nalunem kuya masadakay.
S.PHON: u ɾunəm kuja naɾunəm kuja masaɬ~ɮakaj.
S.TRANSL: 跑出來的是鹿.
What went out was a deer.

S.FORM: makalicay nira ya lunem sacikay satu kiya lunem.
S.PHON: makaɾiʦaj nira ja ɾunəm saʦikaj satu kija ɾunəm.
S.FORM: makalicay nira ya lunem sacikay satu kiya lunem.
S.PHON: makaɾiʦaj nira ja ɾunəm saʦikaj satu kija ɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 他爬在鹿的背上,鹿只好一直跑.
He climbed onto the deer, so the deer kept running.

S.FORM: falahhan nira kuya wacu atu ya lunem.
S.PHON: faɾaħħan nira kuja waʦu atu ja ɾunəm.
S.FORM: falahhan nira kuya wacu atu ya lunem.
S.PHON: faɾaħħan nira kuja waʦu atu ja ɾunəm.
S.TRANSL: 他不理會那隻狗和鹿.
He didn't care about the dog and the deer.

S.FORM: tefad satu tiya alu' kiya wawa atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: təfaɬ~ɮ satu tija aɾuʡ kija wawa atu ja waʦu.
S.FORM: tefad satu tiya alu' kiya wawa atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: təfaɬ~ɮ satu tija aɾuʡ kija wawa atu ja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩跟狗掉落到溪裡.
The child and the dog fell into the stream.

S.FORM: pakayni tuya tefad nangra i alu' satu tiya nanum nika halafin matengil niya wawa ku suni nu takula'.
S.PHON: pakajni tuja təfaɬ~ɮ naŋra i aɾuʡ satu tija nanum nika ħaɾafin matəŋiɾ nija wawa ku suni nu takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: pakayni tuya tefad nangra i alu' satu tiya nanum nika halafin matengil niya wawa ku suni nu takula'.
S.PHON: pakajni tuja təfaɬ~ɮ naŋra i aɾuʡ satu tija nanum nika ħaɾafin matəŋiɾ nija wawa ku suni nu takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉落到溪裡之後,過了很久,那個小孩聽到了青蛙的聲音.
After they fell into the stream, and after a long time, the child heard the frog's sound.

S.FORM: n han nira kuya wacu aka kacaciyau latek ira tini ku takula' ya widang nu mita sa.
S.PHON: n ħan nira kuja waʦu aka kaʦaʦijau ɾatək ira tini ku takuɾaʡ ja wiɬ~ɮaŋ nu mita sa.
S.FORM: n han nira kuya wacu aka kacaciyau latek ira tini ku takula' ya widang nu mita sa.
S.PHON: n ħan nira kuja waʦu aka kaʦaʦijau ɾatək ira tini ku takuɾaʡ ja wiɬ~ɮaŋ nu mita sa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗說:「不要講話,我們的朋友青蛙可能在這裡.」
The child said to the dog, 'Don't speak. Our friend, the frog, might be here.'

S.FORM: na'on sa cangra tayra mitengil.
S.PHON: naʡo~un sa ʦaŋra tajra mitəŋiɾ.
S.FORM: na'on sa cangra tayra mitengil.
S.PHON: naʡo~un sa ʦaŋra tajra mitəŋiɾ.
S.TRANSL: 他們很小心的去聽.
They listened with care.

S.FORM: maaraw nira kiya takula' nira alumanay a takula' itira malawidang.
S.PHON: maaraw nira kija takuɾaʡ nira aɾumanaj a takuɾaʡ itira maɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.FORM: maaraw nira kiya takula' nira alumanay a takula' itira malawidang.
S.PHON: maaraw nira kija takuɾaʡ nira aɾumanaj a takuɾaʡ itira maɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他看見他那隻青蛙跟很多青蛙做朋友.
He saw that the frog had many friends there.

S.FORM: harateng satu aya ira ini kuya takula' sa nu maku sa.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ satu aja ira ini kuja takuɾaʡ sa nu maku sa.
S.FORM: harateng satu aya ira ini kuya takula' sa nu maku sa.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ satu aja ira ini kuja takuɾaʡ sa nu maku sa.
S.TRANSL: 「『唉呀,原來青蛙在這裡,』他是這樣想的,」我說.
'"Ah, my frog was here," he thought,' I said.

S.FORM: harafin maarawtu nira aya kiya takula' sa nu maku sa ciyau tekur tekur sa kuya takula' mira'or cingranan.
S.PHON: ħarafin maarawtu nira aja kija takuɾaʡ sa nu maku sa ʦijau təkur təkur sa kuja takuɾaʡ miraʡo~ur ʦiŋranan.
S.FORM: harafin maarawtu nira aya kiya takula' sa nu maku sa ciyau tekur tekur sa kuya takula' mira'or cingranan.
S.PHON: ħarafin maarawtu nira aja kija takuɾaʡ sa nu maku sa ʦijau təkur təkur sa kuja takuɾaʡ miraʡo~ur ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙跳著接近他們.
The frog leapt towards them.

S.FORM: ta pasuwalhantu nira kiya alumanay widang mitakula' i minukaytu kami.
S.PHON: ta pasuwaɾħantu nira kija aɾumanaj wiɬ~ɮaŋ mitakuɾaʡ i minukajtu kami.
S.FORM: ta pasuwalhantu nira kiya alumanay widang mitakula' i minukaytu kami.
S.PHON: ta pasuwaɾħantu nira kija aɾumanaj wiɬ~ɮaŋ mitakuɾaʡ i minukajtu kami.
S.TRANSL: 之後他告訴那些青蛙的朋友,「我們回家了.」
Then he told the frog's friends, 'We are going home.'

S.FORM: u widang nu maku kura takula' han nira.
S.PHON: u wiɬ~ɮaŋ nu maku kura takuɾaʡ ħan nira.
S.FORM: u widang nu maku kura takula' han nira.
S.PHON: u wiɬ~ɮaŋ nu maku kura takuɾaʡ ħan nira.
S.TRANSL: 「這隻青蛙是我的朋友.」
'The frog is my friend,' said he.

S.FORM: sanga'aytu ku namu han nira a milicay kiya takula'.
S.PHON: saŋaʡajtu ku namu ħan nira a miɾiʦaj kija takuɾaʡ.
S.FORM: sanga'aytu ku namu han nira a milicay kiya takula'.
S.PHON: saŋaʡajtu ku namu ħan nira a miɾiʦaj kija takuɾaʡ.
S.TRANSL: 「你們多保重,」他跟那些青蛙說.
'Take care,' he said to the frogs.

S.FORM: liyas satu cingra atu wacu ningra atu tiya takula' tatulu.
S.PHON: ɾijas satu ʦiŋra atu waʦu niŋra atu tija takuɾaʡ tatuɾu.
S.FORM: liyas satu cingra atu wacu ningra atu tiya takula' tatulu.
S.PHON: ɾijas satu ʦiŋra atu waʦu niŋra atu tija takuɾaʡ tatuɾu.
S.TRANSL: 他跟狗跟青蛙,三個就離開了.
He, the dog, and the frog left.
